title: Sweet Light Romantic Yogurt Galette
description: A light Canadian dessert featuring Greek yogurt, candy, and a romantic touch. Perfect for a romantic dinner or special occasion.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt until well combined.
Add in the unsalted butter and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually pour in the Greek yogurt and stir until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead a few times until it comes together.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Place a ball of dough onto a piece of parchment paper and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Arrange the meringue kisses on top of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the dried cranberries over the top of the meringue kisses.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Use a sharp knife or pastry brush to create a decorative border around the edge of the galette.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Allow the galette to cool on a wire rack for at least 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Just before serving, top with confectioners' sugar, fresh mint leaves, candy cane, and edible flowers.
